extra.reason: Deleted 30 non-Salomon sneakers + 32 colorways + 32 prices + 10 brands from Supabase. FilterSidebar now loads brands/retailers via useBrands/useRetailers hooks instead of hardcoded arrays. Build passes.

Both fixes were already applied in working tree before session: SneakerDetail year Badge removed, main+colorway thumb images switched object-cover→object-contain with bg-gray-50, fallback URL fit=crop→fit=contain. Verified via Playwright on /sneaker/:id — no '1970' badge, full sneaker visible with neutral background.

Both fixes were already applied in working tree before session: SneakerDetail year Badge removed, main+colorway thumb images switched object-cover→object-contain with bg-gray-50, fallback URL fit=crop→fit=contain. Verified via Playwright on /sneaker/:id — no '1970' badge, full sneaker visible with neutral background.
Implemented FilterContext (URL-synced retailer filter), wired into useSneakers via PostgREST inner join on colorways.prices with is_available=true. Validated end-to-end via Playwright.

Added selectedSizes to FilterContext (?sizes=7,9 URL param). useSneakers filters via sneaker_sizes!inner+sizes!inner when sizes selected (handles both size-only and combined retailer+size). Sidebar size buttons toggle. SneakerDetail greys out retailers without selected size. Validated via Playwright (size 7 → 3 sneakers; size 9 → 7; out-of-stock badge correct on detail).

SneakerDetail prices panel now filters retailers via selectedRetailerIds from FilterContext. Inline notice shows 'Filtered by N retailer(s) · Clear' (link clears the filter). Cheapest-retailer auto-select constrained to visible retailers. Validated via Playwright (matching id, non-matching id empty state, clear).

Added retailer toggle pills above the Retailer Prices panel on SneakerDetail. Each pill reads/writes selectedRetailerIds via toggleRetailer; aria-pressed reflects state, active pill is filled blue. Validated via Playwright: pill click adds ?retailers=... to URL, second click removes it.
Swapped Available Sizes panel on SneakerDetail to render us_size instead of uk_size, matching the listing sidebar. Validated via Playwright (sizes now display US 8, US 8.5, ..., US 13).

Added useSizes hook (queries distinct us_size from sizes table). FilterSidebar now renders all 17 DB sizes (US 4 through US 13 incl. halves) instead of hardcoded [7-12]. Validated via Playwright: previously unreachable US 9.5 now filters to 4 sneakers.

Replaced random Math.random() mock for lowest_price/in_stock/price_change in useSneakers with three batched DB queries (prices, sneaker_sizes, price_history) — N+1 collapsed to 3 round trips per page. Verified via Playwright: cards now show real Salomon prices ($259.99-$369.99) instead of random 100-300; size=4 filter narrows to 3 in-stock; size=13 keeps all 7. SneakerCardNew also updated to handle undefined lowest_price gracefully. Unblocks 60q/k6i/4ha.

lowest_price now scoped to retailer + size filter intersect: when size filter is active, build eligibleCwRetailer set from sneaker_sizes survivors and exclude prices whose (colorway, retailer) pair isn't in it. Added retailer_count field on Sneaker and 'across N retailer(s)' subtitle on SneakerCardNew. Verified via Playwright on /?sizes=4: 3 sneakers shown with prices, each labelled 'across 1 retailer' (Salomon-only DB). XT-6 GORE-TEX correctly drops its 'aspargusgreen' colorway when size 4 isn't available there. Logic also handles multi-retailer case correctly though current Salomon-only data can't visually demonstrate price difference. Unblocks igp.

fetchRetailersForSneaker now selects prices.product_url and carries it into the retailerMap alongside the chosen price. SneakerDetail external-link button opens product_url || website_url. Verified live: clicking the link on AERO GLIDE 4 detail page captured https://salomon.com.au/collections/mens/products/aero-glide-5 (product page) instead of the homepage https://salomon.com.au — the per-product URL the scraper already populated is now actually used.

Added useInStockCount and usePriceDropsCount hooks issuing aggregate queries over the full filter-scoped set. useInStockCount uses count:exact head:true on sneakers with inner-join through colorways→sneaker_sizes (is_available=true, plus retailer/size when filtered). usePriceDropsCount fetches matching sneaker+colorway IDs, then their price_history (desc), then computes per-sneaker latest-vs-prior delta in JS and counts negatives. Index.tsx tile values now come from these hooks instead of page-level filter; the 'On Sale' tab keeps a page-scoped count (priceDropsOnPage) since its contents are also page-scoped. Verified live: unfiltered shows 7/7/0; ?sizes=4 narrows to 3/3/0; direct DB call confirms count=7. Both unblock jwl.
